products.title: Ripple Cup Set - Teal
products.description: SET OF TWO GLASSES The Ripple Cup was one of the first calling cards of our studio. Gently waving, its borosilicate glass form is equal parts playful and practical, offering an aesthetic of considered living.

products.description: SET OF TWO GLASSES The Ripple Cup was one of the first calling cards of our studio. Gently waving, its borosilicate glass form is equal parts playful and practical, offering an aesthetic of considered living.

products.title: Le Voyage Vase
products.description: Sargasso Vessel. Part of our Asking For a Friend series. Hand blown in NYC and made to order. Ready to ship in 12 weeks. Please note all Sophie Lou Jacobsen Collectibles can be made in custom colors and are final sale.

products.title: Le Petit Bol Red Set
products.description: SET OF TWO BOWLS A member of the Bouquet collection, Le Petit Bol in red has a smooth sheen like ripe cherries. With its low profile and small scale, this bowl pairs nicely with soups, side salads, and dips for the table like c rème fraîche with potato chips and caviar.

products.title: Giardino Candleholder
products.description: A sculptural piece from the Giardino Segreto series, this glass candleholder studies the flower in form—each hand-shaped to evoke the slender stems of tulip and daffodil varieties. Each silhouette rises with an organic rhythm, reflecting the natural asymmetry of blooms in situ. Ready to ship in 12 weeks. Every piece is made to order, blown by hand in New York City. Please note all collectibles are

products.title: La Pomme
products.description: This glass apple, fit with stemmed lid, was inspired by a jar of sugar cubes from Sophie’s childhood. Its scale, though petit, is generous enough to host accoutrements for the table, flakey sea salt by the stove, or loose leaf tea.

products.title: Bell Pot
products.description: Fashioned after luxe continental breakfast spreads, this classic glass pot for coffee and tea offers a curvy, feminine silhouette with distinct details of curling glass. Complete the collection by pairing the Bell Pot with a set of Tea Cups.

products.title: Sauciere
products.description: This classic saucière was designed for pouring sweet sauces over cakes, milk into coffee, and creamy peppercorn cognac over Steak au poivre.

products.title: Preserves Jar
products.description: A jar for jam, chutney or sweets, this petit vessel features two delicate yet durable handles and a ribbon of glass at the center of its lid.

products.title: Fruit Bowl
products.description: Fashioned after luxe continental breakfast spreads, this glass fruit bowl features a petit base, a bulbous center, and a wide fanning brim.

products.title: L'Espresso Set
products.description: SET OF TWO CUPS Fashioned after luxe continental breakfast spreads, this classic espresso cup features distinct details of curling glass.

products.title: Grande Tasse Set
products.description: SET OF TWO MUGS A handled mug cup for easy mornings over French Press coffee or tea. Perfect too, for cold nights with Hot Toddy’s and mulled wine.

products.title: The Porter - Limited Edition
products.description: Inspired by the elegance of mid-century hotel dining, The Porter is a polished silver toast rack defined by its sculptural symmetry and refined simplicity. It's practical and a little indulgent like salted French butter. Handmade and silver-plated in Venice, this is a limited edition. This item is available for pre-order only with a 8-10 week lead time.

products.title: Petite Tasse Set
products.description: SET OF TWO CUPS Fashioned after luxe continental breakfast spreads, this classic teacup offers a curvy, feminine silhouette with distinct details of curling glass. Complete the collection by pairing this set with the Bell Pot.

products.title: Single Stem Spiral Candleholder
products.description: Sophisticated and sculptural, this single stem of glass spirals upward to hold one tall tapered candle. Its spirit evokes a sense of fine, old-world dining and the decorative arts of the 1930s.

products.title: Double Stem Spiral Candleholder
products.description: Sophisticated and sculptural, this tall glass candelabra offers opposing side scrolls that mirror the shape of curling spirals. Its spirit evokes a sense of fine, old-world dining and the decorative arts of the 1930s.

products.title: Fritter Cocktail Mixer
products.description: A borosilicate glass mixer with a heavy, colorful base and contrasting stir stick. Perfect for making cocktails, serving juices, or for use as a simple pitcher. Complete the set with Fritter Tumblers . The Fritter series was originally conceived in 2021 with New York-based glassblower Grace Whiteside of Sticky Glass, inspired by our shared sensitivity and affinity for the honey nature of glass in

products.title: Fritter Tumbler Set
products.description: SET OF TWO TUMBLERS A set of two borosilicate glass tumblers with colorful bulbous bases. Ideal for cocktails, cordials, aperitifs or digestifs (with or without a rock). Equally suited for less spirited occasions. Complete the set with the Fritter Mixer .

products.title: Le Pichet
products.description: Designed for daily use, Le Pichet is a tabletop staple for serving everything from iced tea to sparkling water. Its gently curving form is an homage in clear glass to the organic fluidity of fanning flowers.

products.title: Le Petit Bol Set
products.description: SET OF TWO BOWLS A member of the Bouquet collection, Le Petit Bol has a subtle curling edge that mimics the rhythmic form of wildflowers. With its low profile and small scale, this bowl pairs nicely with soups, side salads, and dips for the table like c rème fraîche with potato chips and caviar.

products.title: Le Petit Verre Bonbon Set
products.description: SET OF TWO GLASSES A sweet sibling to the classic, clear Le Verre set, Le Verre Bonbon features imperfect pastel stripes that run vertically along the curvature of the cup. Available in a variety of colors and two sensible sizes for all tastes and types of hosting.

products.title: Le Grand Verre Bonbon Set

products.title: Fazzo Surface Mount
products.description: An ethereal surface mount perfect for an entryway. Made using the centuries-old fazzoletto technique—in which a molten glass dome is spun upside-down to create waves that resemble the wilting petals of a flower—and fitted with hand-finished brass details and dim-to-warm bulbs for an airy, ambient glow. products.title: Vera Sconce
products.description: A slumped glass sconce designed to meld seamlessly into its surroundings. To create its delicate floral shape, sheets of cut glass are placed in a kiln over specially made plaster molds; as the kiln heats, gravity forces the malleable glass to drape over the molds. Fitted with hand-finished brass details and a side-by-side duo of dim-to-warm bulbs. For trade pricing, please contact trade@sophielou

Made using the centuries-old fazzoletto technique—in which a molten glass dome is spun upside-down to create waves that resemble the wilting petals of a flower—and fitted with hand-finished brass details. Available with or without handmade dot embellishments. For trade pricing, please contact trade@sophieloujacobsen.com

products.title: Bilboquet Wine Glass Set
products.description: SET OF TWO GLASSES A pair of playful wine glasses in the French ballon style. Perfect for your everyday table wine, festive enough for your best bordeaux. Each pair comes in a set of two mismatching (but complimentary) color combinations.

products.title: Piano Cocktail Glass Set
products.description: SET OF TWO GLASSES Reminiscent of the jazz clubs from New York's gilded age, our now classic Piano Cocktail set offers a contemporary twist on the staple martini glass. Mismatched and complimentary, each color combination suggests that often things are better together. Each set comes with two stainless steel garnish skewers.

products.title: Bilboquet Carafe
products.description: A playful take on the traditional wine decanter. Perfect for wine, but also any other liquid! See below for more details.

products.title: Bloom Teapot
products.description: A collaboration with whole flower tea brand The Qi , this playful teapot was designed to celebrate the beauty of transformation as teas, flower or any, transform as they steep. Each teapot come with one Shangri-La Rose teas, but it is suitable for any type of tea or coffee. See below for more details.

products.title: Ripple Cup Set
products.description: SET OF TWO GLASSES The Ripple Cup was one of the first calling cards of our studio. Gently waving, its borosilicate glass form is equal parts playful and practical, offering an aesthetic of considered living.
